effect.name: Flanger
effect.description:
Flanger (LADSPA 1191)
A digital flanger implementation. Uses a novel zero excursion, controlled bandwidth modulation function, which should make the modulation less repetitive and noticeable.
effect.author: Steve Harris (http://www.ladspa.org)

parameter.name: Delay Base
parameter.comment:
This is the offset from
the input time that the detune delay moves around

parameter.name: Max Slowdown
parameter.comment:
This is the maximum
delay that will be applied to the delayed signal, relative to the dry signal.

parameter.name: LFO Frequency
parameter.comment:
This is the core frequency
that the 'LFO' will move at. The LFO isn't actually an oscillator, but it does vary periodically.

parameter.name: Feedback
parameter.comment:
Feedback applied from the
output to the input, increases the depth of the effect, but makes it sound less like a real flanger.
